title: Missing alt text on images
description: HTML images without alt attributes violating accessibility standards

mutation.description: Remove alt prop from image component

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect missing accessibility attributes

title: Poor color contrast ratio
description: UI elements with insufficient color contrast for readability

mutation.description: Set text color with low contrast against background

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect WCAG contrast violations

title: Keyboard navigation not supported
description: Interactive elements that cannot be accessed via keyboard navigation

mutation.description: Remove keyboard event handlers from interactive component

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect lack of keyboard accessibility

title: Responsive design breakpoint failure
description: Layout that breaks on mobile devices due to fixed widths

mutation.description: Use fixed pixel widths instead of responsive units

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect responsive design issues

title: Poor user experience with slow loading states
description: UI without loading indicators causing poor perceived performance

mutation.description: Remove loading spinner during data fetch

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect lack of loading state UX
